description: Scatters points on a 3D shape. Uses sunflower-spiral distribution on planes, evenly spaced on lines. Default count: 20.
utility: Scatter a cloud of points on a 3D plane or line

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: A plane3d or line3d to scatter points on

arguments.name: count
arguments.description: Number of points to scatter. Default: 20

alternates.description: Scatter a specific number of points

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
P = plane3d(G, "x + y + z = 3")
pointcloud3d(G, P, size(50))

examples.scenario: Default point cloud on a line
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
L = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 3, 3, 3))
pointcloud3d(G, L)
